releasedThisWeek.title: RAVEPOP
releasedThisWeek.artist: r u s s e l b u c k
releasedThisWeek.highlight: 未来主义电子流行，一场声光交织的迷幻派对
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: Futuristic electronic pop, a psychedelic party of sound and light
releasedThisWeek.summary: RAVEPOP 融合电子节拍与迷幻旋律，营造出沉浸式的未来感听觉体验，适合喜欢实验电子乐的听众。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: RAVEPOP blends electronic beats with psychedelic melodies, creating an immersive futuristic auditory experience for fans of experimental electronic music.

releasedThisWeek.title: Euphoria
releasedThisWeek.highlight: 德国电子音乐大师的 euphoria 之旅，宏大而动人
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: German electronic maestro's euphoric journey, grand and moving
releasedThisWeek.summary: Schiller 的新专辑延续其标志性的宏大电子氛围，旋律优美，情感充沛，是电子乐迷的盛宴。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: Schiller's new album continues his signature grand electronic ambience, with beautiful melodies and rich emotion, a feast for electronic music fans.

releasedThisWeek.title: DREAMBOY (UNFINISHED)
releasedThisWeek.highlight: Lil Nas X 未完成的自白，大胆而真诚
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: Lil Nas X's unfinished confession, bold and sincere
releasedThisWeek.summary: 这张未完成的专辑展现了 Lil Nas X 最私密的一面，融合流行与嘻哈元素，充满情感张力。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: This unfinished album reveals Lil Nas X's most intimate side, blending pop and hip-hop with emotional tension.

releasedThisWeek.title: Electric Fantasy
releasedThisWeek.highlight: 法国电子爵士的奇幻梦境，优雅而灵动
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: French electro-jazz fantasy dream, elegant and agile
releasedThisWeek.summary: Pierre Schott 以电子音效和爵士即兴编织出奇幻的音乐画卷，适合喜欢跨界音乐的听众。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: Pierre Schott weaves a fantastic musical tapestry with electronic sounds and jazz improvisation, perfect for fans of crossover music.

releasedThisWeek.title: Eingenordet
releasedThisWeek.highlight: 德国异教民谣金属，粗粝而富有力量
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: German pagan folk metal, rugged and powerful
releasedThisWeek.summary: Versengold 的新专辑融合民谣旋律与重金属力量，歌词充满神话色彩，适合金属乐迷。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: Versengold's new album blends folk melodies with heavy metal power, with mythological lyrics, suitable for metal fans.

releasedThisWeek.title: Living Free (Live Manchester '75)
releasedThisWeek.highlight: Don McLean 1975 年曼彻斯特现场，经典重现
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: Don McLean's 1975 Manchester live, classic revival
releasedThisWeek.summary: 这张现场专辑记录了 Don McLean 巅峰时期的演出，包含《American Pie》等经典曲目，民谣爱好者必听。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: This live album captures Don McLean in his prime, featuring classics like 'American Pie', a must-listen for folk enthusiasts.

releasedThisWeek.title: Melodrama
releasedThisWeek.highlight: LINA 的 Melodrama，情感丰富的流行佳作
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: LINA's Melodrama, an emotionally rich pop masterpiece
releasedThisWeek.summary: LINA 以戏剧性的流行曲风讲述情感故事，旋律抓耳，适合喜欢流行音乐的听众。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: LINA tells emotional stories with dramatic pop style, catchy melodies, suitable for pop music fans.

releasedThisWeek.title: The Power Station
releasedThisWeek.highlight: The Power Station 同名专辑，80年代摇滚复兴
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: The Power Station's self-titled album, 80s rock revival
releasedThisWeek.summary: 超级乐队 The Power Station 的同名专辑，硬摇滚风格，节奏强劲，是80年代摇滚的经典重现。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: Supergroup The Power Station's self-titled album, hard rock style with strong rhythms, a classic revival of 80s rock.

releasedThisWeek.title: Convenience Store Gospel
releasedThisWeek.highlight: 便利店福音，另类乡村的幽默与温情
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: Convenience store gospel, humor and warmth of alternative country
releasedThisWeek.summary: Brodie Milner 的单曲以便利店为主题，融合乡村与幽默，轻松温暖，适合喜欢另类音乐的听众。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: Brodie Milner's single themed around convenience stores, blending country with humor, light and warm, for fans of alternative music.

releasedThisWeek.title: Galaxia Tropical
releasedThisWeek.highlight: 德国厂牌发行的秘鲁热带音乐，异域风情十足
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: Peruvian tropical music released by German label, full of exotic flavor
releasedThisWeek.summary: Ranil Y Su Conjunto Tropical 带来热情洋溢的秘鲁热带音乐，节奏欢快，适合跳舞。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: Ranil Y Su Conjunto Tropical brings passionate Peruvian tropical music, upbeat rhythms, perfect for dancing.

releasedThisWeek.title: One Moment in Time: Live in the USA
releasedThisWeek.highlight: Robin Trower 美国现场，布鲁斯摇滚的即兴魅力
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: Robin Trower live in USA, the improvisational charm of blues rock
releasedThisWeek.summary: Robin Trower 的现场专辑展现其精湛的吉他技巧和布鲁斯摇滚的即兴魅力，乐迷不容错过。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: Robin Trower's live album showcases his superb guitar skills and the improvisational charm of blues rock, a must for fans.

releasedThisWeek.title: Warehouse 2026: 7.16.2025 Allianz Amphitheater At Riverfront, Richmond, VA
releasedThisWeek.highlight: Dave Matthews Band 2025 年现场，即兴与激情
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: Dave Matthews Band 2025 live, improvisation and passion
releasedThisWeek.summary: Dave Matthews Band 的最新现场专辑，充满即兴演奏和乐队激情，是现场音乐爱好者的首选。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: Dave Matthews Band's latest live album, full of improvisation and band passion, a top choice for live music lovers.

upcoming.title: DREAMBOY (UNFINISHED)
upcoming.highlight: Lil Nas X未完成的自传式梦核专辑，大胆前卫。
upcoming.highlightEn: Lil Nas X's unfinished autobiographical dreamcore album, bold and avant-garde.
upcoming.summary: Lil Nas X以未完成概念探索个人成长与公众形象，风格跨界流行与实验，充满话题性。
upcoming.summaryEn: Lil Nas X explores personal growth and public image through an unfinished concept, blending pop and experimental styles, highly topical.

upcoming.title: The Power Station
upcoming.highlight: 经典摇滚超级组合同名专辑复刻，硬摇滚能量满载。
upcoming.highlightEn: Classic rock supergroup's self-titled album reissue, full of hard rock energy.
upcoming.summary: The Power Station由Robert Palmer等人组成，同名专辑融合放克与硬摇滚，是80年代标志性声音。
upcoming.summaryEn: Fronted by Robert Palmer, The Power Station's self-titled album fuses funk and hard rock, an iconic 80s sound.

upcoming.title: Euphoria
upcoming.highlight: Schiller回归，史诗氛围电子之旅。
upcoming.highlightEn: Schiller returns with an epic ambient electronic journey.
upcoming.summary: 德国电子大师Schiller新作延续宏大叙事风格，融合交响元素，营造沉浸式听觉体验。
upcoming.summaryEn: German electronic maestro Schiller continues his grand narrative style, blending orchestral elements for an immersive experience.

upcoming.title: Living Free (Live Manchester '75)
upcoming.highlight: Don McLean 1975年曼彻斯特现场，民谣经典重现。
upcoming.highlightEn: Don McLean's 1975 Manchester live album, folk classics revived.
upcoming.summary: 记录Don McLean巅峰时期现场，包括《Vincent》等不朽名作，音质修复出色。
upcoming.summaryEn: Captures Don McLean at his peak, including timeless hits like 'Vincent', with excellent sound restoration.

upcoming.title: One Moment in Time: Live in the USA
upcoming.highlight: Robin Trower美国现场，布鲁斯摇滚吉他盛宴。
upcoming.highlightEn: Robin Trower live in the USA, a blues-rock guitar feast.
upcoming.summary: Robin Trower以其标志性吉他音色征服现场，这张专辑收录了多首即兴演奏。
upcoming.summaryEn: Robin Trower captivates with his signature guitar tone; this album features extended improvisations.

upcoming.title: RAVEPOP
upcoming.artist: r u s s e l b u c k
upcoming.highlight: r u s s e l b u c k带你进入超流行狂欢。
upcoming.highlightEn: r u s s e l b u c k takes you into a hyperpop rave.
upcoming.summary: RAVEPOP融合嘈杂电子与流行旋律，充满DIY精神，适合喜欢另类舞曲的听众。
upcoming.summaryEn: RAVEPOP blends noisy electronics with pop melodies, full of DIY spirit, perfect for fans of alternative dance music.

upcoming.title: Shion. E.P
upcoming.highlightEn: Rudo's Shion.EP, deep ambient electronic vignettes.
upcoming.summary: EP以细腻音景和缓慢节奏构建内省空间，适合深夜聆听。
upcoming.summaryEn: The EP builds introspective spaces with delicate soundscapes and slow tempos, ideal for late-night listening.

upcoming.title: Eingenordet
upcoming.highlight: Versengold德式民谣金属，海盗主题狂欢。
upcoming.highlightEn: Versengold's German folk metal, pirate-themed revelry.
upcoming.summary: Versengold以手风琴与重吉他结合，讲述航海故事，现场感染力极强。
upcoming.summaryEn: Versengold combines accordion and heavy guitars to tell seafaring tales, with strong live appeal.

upcoming.title: Galaxia Tropical
upcoming.highlight: Ranil Y Su Conjunto Tropical秘鲁热带风情，复古舞曲。
upcoming.highlightEn: Ranil Y Su Conjunto Tropical's Peruvian tropical vibes, retro dance music.
upcoming.summary: 经典秘鲁热带乐队再版，融合cumbia与chicha风格，充满阳光律动。
upcoming.summaryEn: Classic Peruvian tropical band reissue, blending cumbia and chicha, brimming with sunny rhythms.

upcoming.title: Utan Ok Innan
upcoming.highlight: Vígundr黑金属单曲，冰冷北欧氛围。
upcoming.highlightEn: Vígundr's black metal single, icy Nordic atmosphere.
upcoming.summary: 单曲以冰冷音墙和嘶吼营造荒凉景观，黑暗而富有诗意。
upcoming.summaryEn: The single creates desolate landscapes with icy walls of sound and shrieks, dark and poetic.

upcoming.title: Melodrama
upcoming.highlight: LINA的Melodrama，流行与戏剧张力结合。
upcoming.highlightEn: LINA's Melodrama, pop meets theatrical tension.
upcoming.summary: LINA以强烈叙事和编曲探索爱恨主题，声音华丽而充满戏剧性。
upcoming.summaryEn: LINA explores love and hatred with strong narrative and arrangement, sounding lavish and dramatic.
